title: Integrate optimization decisions with value function, malfunction mix, and red flags
description:
## Summary
Integrate workflow decisions with value-function scoring, malfunction analysis, and red-flag heuristics.

## Deliverables
- Define how deterministic metrics, random metrics, malfunction mix, and evaluation-level flags combine into one accept/reject/reroute decision.
- Ensure the workflow can recommend score optimization, SME clarification, upstream remediation, or bug investigation.
- Keep the decision policy auditable and explainable.
